message:
test(wave-62): trait coverage for io/cap, bridge, unix/stream, reactor

IoNotAvailable Debug/Clone/Eq, LabIoCap Debug/Default, RegionMode/
SyncMode/ConflictResolution/EffectiveState Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq,
BridgeConfig/SyncState Debug/Clone/Default, UCred Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq,
Interest Debug/Clone/Copy/Hash/Default, Token Debug/Clone/Copy/Hash/Ord,
Event Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq.
